content_note: Reader-mode text snapshot of the official Disney recreation page. Line numbers preserve the source extraction view used for fixture spans.

lines.text: ## Recreation
* ## Pools
Enjoy a refreshing dip at one of our pool locations—sporting whirlpool spas and more!
* ## Chip ‘N’ Dale’s Campfire Sing-A-Long
Join nutty friends Chip ‘n’ Dale for some old-fashioned family fun as you roast marshmallows around a crackling fire.
* ## Fort Wilderness Archery Experience
Train like an archer as you learn to hold a bow, take aim and send an arrow soaring towards a target.
* ## Tri-Circle-D Ranch
Say howdy to pony, wagon and carriage rides along scenic wilderness trails.
* ## Holiday Sleigh Rides
Trot through serene woodlands on a festive horse-drawn carriage.
* ## Pony Rides
Thrill your tiny tyke with an opportunity to saddle up on a petite pony!
* ## Wagon Rides
Giddyup for an old-fashioned, horse-drawn wagon ride around the Resort.
* ## Fishing
Reel in some old-fashioned fun with a guided fishing excursion out on the water.
* ## Electrical Water Pageant
Add some twinkling charm to each evening of your stay during a delightful nighttime water parade!

Glimmering along the shoreline of this Resort hotel destination, the Electrical Water Pageant gives Guests of all ages the chance to marvel at spectacular sights and sounds as sparkling sea creatures—both grand in size and epic in scope—cruise the lagoon to electronic Disney tunes you know and love.
Best of all, as the show reaches its patriotic conclusion, you can marvel cozily from the comfort of this Resort hotel’s own magical viewing place!
* ## Bike Rentals
Grab a rental from the Bike Barn and cycle through pine forests and meadows teeming with wildlife.
* ## Canoe Rentals
Paddle along serene waterways as you take in the natural beauty of Central Florida.
* ## Kayak Rentals
Glide along on an adventure as you paddle and pilot the beautiful lakes, lagoons and bays Walt Disney World Resort has to offer.
* ## Basketball Courts

Shoot some hoops at one of several basketball courts located throughout Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort & Campground. Basketballs are available in a designated box at each court. If the box is empty, simply call Housekeeping from a Comfort Station phone and a basketball will be delivered to the court.
* ## Jogging Trails
Jog through lush meadows and pine and cypress groves. Maps are available from the Concierge.
* ## Volleyball
Enjoy a friendly volleyball match on a sandy court located at Meadow Recreation Area. Complimentary equipment is available at the Bike Barn for all Guests staying at a Disney Resort hotel.
* ## Playgrounds
Kids can climb, slide and swing to their hearts’ content at playgrounds throughout Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort.
* ## Davy Crockett’s Wilderness Arcade
Head on down to Pioneer Hall for a variety of video and pinball games.
* ## Daniel Boone’s Wilderness Arcade
Delight in games both classic and contemporary at this arcade near the Meadow Swimmin’ Pool.
* ## Wilderness Back Trail Adventure
Glide by lush, Floridian scenery on an all-terrain Segway vehicle.
* ## Horse Drawn Excursion – Carriage Ride at Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort & Campground
Trot along the scenic bank of the Sassagoula River or through lush pine trails during a 25-minute vintage carriage ride.
* ## Holiday Sleigh Rides
Trot through the serene woodland on a festive horse-drawn carriage “sleigh” ride.
## View Rooms and Prices
